question.question: What DNS records are required before starting SNO 4.16 installation?

response.answer_markdown:
### DNS Records Required for SNO 4.16 Installation

The DNS records required before starting SNO 4.16 installation are not explicitly stated in the provided evidence blocks [S1][S2][S3][S4][S5][S6]. However, it is mentioned that the base domain of the cluster is required, and all DNS records must be sub-domains of this base and include the cluster name [S5]. Additionally, sample A records for name resolution in a cluster using the platform "none" option are provided [S1][S6], but the specific DNS records required for SNO 4.16 installation are not clearly defined.

### What this does not establish
This does not establish the specific DNS records required for SNO 4.16 installation, as the provided evidence blocks do not contain explicit information on this topic.

### Sources
[S1] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 18–19
[S2] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 16–17
[S3] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 30–30

question.question: What is the default network plugin used in OpenShift Container Platform 4.16?
question.notes: OVN-Kubernetes is the default CNI. Should cite networking guide.

response.answer_markdown:
### Default Network Plugin in OpenShift Container Platform 4.16

The default network plugin used in OpenShift Container Platform 4.16 is OVNKubernetes [S3][S4][S5]. This is the only supported value for the cluster network plugin to install [S4][S5].

### What this does not establish

This does not establish how to configure or manage the OVNKubernetes network plugin, as the provided evidence only mentions the default value and does not provide instructions for customization or troubleshooting.

### Sources
[S1] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 82–83
[S2] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 103–104
[S3] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 82–83
[S4] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 30–30
[S5] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 30–30
[S6] Installing an On-Premise Cluster with the Agent-based Installer (OCP 4.16) — OCP 4.16, pp. 92–93
